n: Book 13, Chapter 2: The Snowmen of Forochel

steps.t: Dáthi is at Kauppa-kohta in the land of Forochel north of Evendim through the Gate to the North. Laerdan has asked you to go to Forochel and speak wit…
Lassi is at Sûri-kylä north and east along the Ice Bay of Forochel. Dáthi told you of Laerdan's last visit and of the arrival of the Angmarim. He told…
